--     .       with vectorization level 1 (SSE2, 2 doubles, 128 bits)
--     . using Trilinos 16.2.0
--     . using p4est 2.8.7
--     . using Geodynamic World Builder 1.0.0
--     . running in OPTIMIZED mode
--     . running with 25 MPI processes
